gold.displayName: Concierge Gold (cream register only; one stop in the wordmark ramp)

vermillion.displayName: Hanko Vermillion (hanko ink only; not a UI accent)

sakura.displayName: Sakura (petal ink; /lines register accent, same hue as the functional accent)

sakura-wash.displayName: Sakura Wash (soft petal tint for panels on cream)

accent.displayName: Foil Accent (THE functional UI accent, sakura on night; ADR-097 supersedes teal)

accent-deep.displayName: Foil Accent Deep (the darker sakura sibling for cream surfaces, 4.8:1)

gold-anchor.displayName: Gold Anchor (real gold #856a00; base of the metallic TCG wordmark ramp, the only gold on night surfaces)

display.purpose: Hero H1 only, one per page. Fraunces, -0.01em tracking.

title.purpose: Card titles, plan names, form section labels.

body.purpose: Lead and supporting copy. Geist. Measure capped 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, meta tags, pill text. Often uppercase, +0.05em.

mono.purpose: Prices, grades, set codes. Geist Mono with tabular-nums.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Default for cards and list rows. Barely-there separation from cream.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state for interactive cards and the primary button.

shadows.name: feature
shadows.purpose: Premium plan card, example-result panel, final-CTA slab. Used sparingly.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for hover lifts and state transitions. No bounce.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Hover lift + shadow growth on buttons and cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The workhorse CTA. Navy fill, coral on hover with a lift and a gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0f1e3a; color: #f8f5f0; font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; padding: 14px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(15,30,58,0.20); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ff6b5c; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px rgba(15,30,58,0.30), 0 0 0 2px rgba(201,162,75,0.40); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(201,162,75,0.50); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; transform: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-priority action. Cream fill, navy text, hairline border that warms to gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #f8f5f0; color: #0f1e3a; font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(15,30,58,0.15); border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(201,162,75,0.40); background: rgba(201,162,75,0.05); }

components.name: Text Link
components.description: Inline navigational link. Navy with a faint underline that swaps to gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-link { color: #0f1e3a; font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(15,30,58,0.20); text-underline-offset: 4px; transition: text-decoration-color 150ms ease; } .ds-link:hover { text-decoration-color: #c9a24b; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Card-name search field. Cream fill, hairline border, clean gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #f8f5f0; color: #0f1e3a; font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(15,30,58,0.15); border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(74,85,104,0.60); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #c9a24b; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(201,162,75,0.30); }

components.name: Deal Badge
components.description: Positive-signal pill. Low-alpha gold tint, navy label text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; background: rgba(201,162,75,0.15); color: #0f1e3a; font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Live Pill
components.description: The one sanctioned glassmorphism element: a backdrop-blurred status pill with an animated gold ping dot.
components.css: .ds-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: rgba(248,245,240,0.80); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); color: #0f1e3a; font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,75,0.40); border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-live-dot { position: relative; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c9a24b; } .ds-live-dot::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c9a24b; opacity: 0.6; animation: ds-ping 1.4s cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-ping { 75%, 100% { transform: scale(2.2); opacity: 0; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-live-dot::after { animation: none; } }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard container. Cream fill, hairline navy border, flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html:
Search any Pokémon card

Type the name, set, or just 'Charizard Base Set.'
components.css: .ds-card { background: #f8f5f0; border: 1px solid rgba(15,30,58,0.10); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,30,58,0.05); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(15,30,58,0.10); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; color: #0f1e3a; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Geist', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #4a5568; margin: 8px 0 0; }

components.name: Premium Card
components.description: The 'this one is special' container. Same cream fill, but framed in gold with a ring and the Feature shadow. Special is said with gold framing, never a different fill.
components.css: .ds-card-premium { background: #f8f5f0; border: 1px solid rgba(201,162,75,0.50); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px rgba(15,30,58,0.10), 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,162,75,0.30); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #0f1e3a; margin: 0; } .ds-price { font-family: 'Fraunces', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 2.25rem; color: #0f1e3a; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin: 16px 0 0; }

narrative.overview: Foil should feel like stepping behind the counter of a reputable card shop and having the owner slide one sleeve across the glass: 'This is the one. I already checked the rest.' The surface is warm and unhurried, cream paper rather than screen-white, with navy ink and a single thread of gold reserved for the things that actually matter. The system is type-led and restraint-driven: Fraunces carries the headlines with tight editorial tracking, color is the discipline, and depth is whispered through navy-tinted shadow and hairline borders. It rejects the generic AI SaaS template, the loud crypto/hype marketplace, the sterile enterprise dashboard, and the bargain-bin coupon site. Foil curates; it does not shout.
keyCharacteristics: Cream paper surface, navy ink, gold rationed to ≤10% of any screen.
Type-led hierarchy in Fraunces with -0.01em display tracking.
Navy-tinted shadows and hairline borders; flat at rest, a gentle lift on touch.
Coral is a hover-only response, never a resting color.
Mobile-first: thumb-sized targets, one best answer over a wall of results.

rules.name: The Coral-Hover-Only Rule
rules.body: Coral (#ff6b5c) is forbidden as a resting color. It appears only as a hover/active response or in an error message. A coral element sitting still on the page is a bug.

rules.name: The Scarce Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold covers ≤10% of any screen. It marks one thing per view. The moment gold becomes a section background or a second button fill, it stops meaning anything and the design has failed.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black-Or-White Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are prohibited. Navy (#0f1e3a) is the darkest ink; cream (#f8f5f0) is the lightest surface. Every neutral is tinted toward the brand.

rules.name: The Display-for-Headlines Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is for H1/H2/H3, the wordmark, and stat figures only. It is forbidden in body copy, captions, and form help text.

rules.name: The Tabular-Price Rule
rules.body: Every dollar figure renders with tabular-nums so prices align and never jitter on update. Money is the product; it must sit still.

rules.name: The Navy-Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow carries foil-navy alpha, never rgba(0,0,0,...). A neutral-black shadow on the cream surface looks dirty and breaks the warmth.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat until touched. Shadow growth and a -2px translate are a response to hover, not a resting decoration.

dos: Do keep the surface on cream (#f8f5f0) and the ink on navy (#0f1e3a); reach for gold (#c9a24b) only to mark the single most important signal on a screen.
Do use Fraunces for headlines with -0.01em tracking, and Geist for everything you actually read.
Do render every price with tabular-nums in Geist Mono.
Do tint shadows with foil-navy alpha and keep surfaces flat until hover.
Do swap navy to coral on hover for primary buttons; it is the one place coral belongs.
Do frame 'premium' with a gold border + ring, not a different fill color.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on the hover lift and the live-dot ping (an ADR-029 followup, required, not yet implemented everywhere).
donts: Don't build the generic AI SaaS template: no gradient text, no identical icon-card grids, no big-number hero-metric cliché.
Don't go loud crypto/hype: no neon-on-dark, no countdown timers, no 'DEALS!' urgency.
Don't go sterile enterprise: no cold gray surfaces, no warmth-free dense data tables.
Don't go bargain-bin coupon site: no clutter, no ad noise, no discount-screaming.
Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere; navy and cream are the true black/white.
Don't let coral rest. If coral is visible without a hover or an error, it is a bug.
Don't let gold spread past ~10% of a screen.

Don't use background-clip: text gradients, with ONE sanctioned exception: the wordmark's .wordmark-tcg metallic ramp (ADR-106), where the gradient IS the meaning (metal, not decoration). No other text gradient is permitted, and no panel gradients ever.
Don't use side-stripe accents (border-left/border-right > 1px as a color bar) or default to a modal when an inline or progressive reveal would do.
